سعر المتر لكل نوع، مقارنة الجودة والمتان: Per-meter price for each type, a quality and durability comparison, and the best choice for every budget — from 22 years of experience finishing apartments and villas in Cairo
لماذا يصعب مقارنة أسعار البلاط في مصر؟: Why is it hard to compare tile prices in Egypt?
أول سؤال يطرحه كل عميل عندنا هو: \"كام س: The first question every client asks us is: "How much per meter?" — and the honest answer is: it depends on many factors. The same name "crema marble" sells in the market at prices ranging between EGP 350 and 900 per meter depending on the workshop, the quality of processing, and the distance of the location.
في هذا الدليل جمعنا أسعار موردينا الفعلي: In this guide we've gathered our suppliers' actual prices during the first quarter of 2026, clarifying the essential differences between each material so you can make a decision based on real information rather than guesswork.
أسعار الرخام في مصر 2026 — حسب النوع وال: Marble prices in Egypt 2026 — by type and origin
مصر من أغنى دول العالم بمحاجر الرخام — م: Egypt is one of the world's richest countries in marble quarries — the quarries of Shalateen, Jabal Al-Atlal, and the Eastern Desert produce marble that is exported to Europe. For local projects, this means very competitive prices.
* الأسعار للتوريد فقط — التركيب يضاف 80–: * Prices are for supply only — installation adds EGP 80–160/m² depending on complexity.
الأشهر عالمياً — أبيض مع عروق رمادية: The most famous worldwide — white with gray veins
عروق ذهبية — للصالونات الفاخرة جداً: Gold veins — for very luxurious living rooms
بديل اقتصادي للإيطالي — جودة جيدة: An economical alternative to Italian — good quality
أسود فاخر مع ذهبي — مطابخ وحمامات: Luxurious black with gold — kitchens and bathrooms
الغرانيت أقسى من الرخام وأكثر مقاومةً لل: Granite is harder than marble and more resistant to scratches and heat — making it the ideal choice for a kitchen countertop. Egypt has world-famous Aswani granite quarries.
أسعار البورسلين في مصر 2026 — من الاقتصا: Porcelain prices in Egypt 2026 — from economy to luxury
البورسلين هو الخيار الأذكى لمن يريد مظهر: Porcelain is the smartest choice for those who want a luxurious look at reasonable prices and low maintenance. A water absorption rate below 0.5% makes it far more durable than ordinary ceramic.

نصائح المهندسين لتوفير 20–30% من تكلفة ا: Engineers' tips to save 20–30% on tile costs
اشترِ بكميات في أمر واحد:: Buy in bulk in a single order:
شراء جميع البلاط من نفس الدُّفعة يضمن تط: Buying all the tile from the same batch ensures color matching and gives you negotiating power — the difference can reach 10–15%.
استخدم الرخام في نقاط التميز فقط:: Use marble only at focal points:
رخام في الصالون والمدخل وجدار الحمام الر: Marble in the living room, entrance, and master bathroom wall — porcelain everywhere else. A luxurious look at a quarter of the cost.
تفاوض على بقايا مشاريع كبيرة:: Negotiate for leftovers from large projects:
الموردون يبيعون بقايا مشاريع فاخرة بخصم: Suppliers sell leftovers from luxury projects at a 30–50% discount — ideal for small areas (under 80 m²).
10% للمساحات المستطيلة، 15% للتركيب بزاو: 10% for rectangular areas, 15% for 45° installation, 20% for irregular areas. Buying less than enough costs you delays and extra expenses.
